conspiracy_evidence.theory: Albert Watson coordinated with Emily to manufacture police report for litigation advantage
conspiracy_evidence.evidence: NS2505044: Albert called police, stated goal was to get ex parte order next day
conspiracy_evidence.legal_basis: MCL 750.157a (conspiracy), 42 USC §1985(3) (conspiracy to deprive civil rights)

conspiracy_evidence.theory: Albert Watson physically interfered with custody exchanges
conspiracy_evidence.evidence: 20 timeline events involving Albert, including physical removal of child

conspiracy_evidence.theory: Watson family operated as coordinated unit to alienate father
conspiracy_evidence.evidence: Multiple family members (Albert, Cody, Emily) rotated interference tactics
conspiracy_evidence.legal_basis: MCL 722.23(j) (best interest — willingness to facilitate relationship)

legal_theories.application: Albert manufactured police report as foundation for fraudulent ex parte filing
legal_theories.time_bar: NONE — independent action for fraud on the court has no time limit

legal_theories.application: Watson family conspired with Emily to deprive Andrew of parental rights through fraudulent legal process
legal_theories.time_bar: 2 years from last overt act (continuing violation doctrine extends)

legal_theories.application: Ex parte order based on manufactured evidence = deprivation without due process
legal_theories.time_bar: 3 years (Michigan personal injury SOL applies to §1983)

legal_theories.rule: Michigan common law (Friedman v Dozorc, 412 Mich 1)
legal_theories.application: Using police report and PPO/custody system for improper purpose (alienation, not protection)

smoking_gun.key_admission: Albert said they want this incident documented so Emily can go tomorrow to get an Ex Parte order for full custody of her son.
smoking_gun.legal_significance: Recorded admission of premeditated conspiracy to manufacture evidence for custody litigation
